results.title: Raises.com(R) Advises on Successful Inaugural Acquisition of a Texas-Based HVAC Services Platform
results.description: NAVASOTA, TX / ACCESS Newswire / July 8, 2026 / Raises.com is pleased to announce the successful closing of the inaugural acquisition of an operator-led roll-up platform founded by Cody Sechelski, with the controlled buyout of a profitable Texas-based heating,...

results.title: Victims of 23andMe data breach to get $47m payout, judge rules
results.description: Victims of a 2023 data hack at genetics testing company 23andMe are set to receive a multi-million-dollar payout from the firm.

results.title: Scammers targeting Iowa food trucks, vendors lose hundreds before fireworks event
results.description: Scammers are targeting small business owners in Iowa, causing two food trucks to lose hundreds of dollars.
